BackstoryDef.title: Worm Child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised in a cult worshipping earthworms. [PAWN_possessive] entire childhood was based on learning to do things without [PAWN_objective] arms and legs. While this was horrible for [PAWN_possessive] limb development, it did give [PAWN_objective] a good view and understanding of plantlife.
